title: TurbulenceModel entity (ONT-E-15)
description: A turbulence model (SA, k-omega-SST, k-epsilon, RSM, LES sub-grid, DES/DDES/IDDES blends, transition models, etc.). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref + unevaluatedProperties: false (NEVER additionalProperties — Pitfall #1). reference_url should point to NASA Turbulence Modeling Resource (https://tmbwg.github.io/turbmodels/) entries when available. Referenced from SimulationCase.turbulence_model_ref. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. MUST be the literal string 'TurbulenceModel'.

family.description: Turbulence model family. SA = Spalart-Allmaras (1-eq); k-omega-SST = Menter's 2-eq SST; k-epsilon = standard / realizable / RNG variants; k-omega = Wilcox 2-eq; RSM = Reynolds-Stress Model (7-eq); LES_subgrid = LES sub-grid scale model (Smagorinsky, WALE, dynamic, etc.); DES_blend / DDES_blend / IDDES_blend = hybrid RANS-LES blending models built on a RANS base (typically SA or SST); transition_model = γ-Reθ, AFT, etc.; other = escape hatch (discouraged — please widen the enum instead).

applicability.description: Optional free-text descriptions of flow regimes the model is suitable for (e.g. ['attached external aero', 'mild adverse pressure gradient', 'transitional flows up to Re_theta ~3e6']).

limitations.description: Optional free-text descriptions of known model limitations (e.g. ['poor in massively separated flows', 'over-predicts shock-induced separation', 'transition not modeled — assumes fully turbulent BL']).

references.description: Optional list of Document entity URIs (canonical paper / report references for the model).

reference_url.description: Optional external reference URL. PREFERRED target: a NASA Turbulence Modeling Resource (TMR) page at https://tmbwg.github.io/turbmodels/ for the model. ERCOFTAC validation pages and AIAA Workshop entries are also acceptable.
